chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-564 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on office objection. For hearing of main case. 17.02.2025 Syed Inayat Hussain Shah advocate for petitioners. Learned counsel for the petitioners states that the petitioners would approach before concerned Magistrate by filing an application in terms of section 133 Cr.P.C. as such, under instructions he does not press instant petition. Accordingly, instant petition is dismissed as not pressed leaving the petitioner to exhaust remedy by filing application under section 133 Cr.P.C. before the concerned Magistrate of competent jurisdiction. JUDGE JUDGE *Abdullah Channa/PS*
